title: Ascension: The Infinite Descent
description:
The Infinite Descent AwaitsPlunge into the depths of an endless, unforgiving dungeon in Ascension: The Infinite Descent. Your goal is simple: survive and descend as far as possible into the abyss. Make no mistake—you will die, and you will die often. But in this dungeon, death is the engine of your progression. The deeper you manage to push into the darkness, the greater the rewards you reap, accelerating your growth for the inevitable next run.

Tactical Loadout CombatYour survival relies on a carefully chosen loadout of abilities, not a random deck of cards.

• Custom Loadouts: Equip up to 3 repeatable action cards at a time, selecting from a growing pool of physical strikes, arcane wards, elemental spells, and monstrous summons.

• Deep Scaling Math: Your actions don't just do flat damage. Every attack, shield, and status effect scales dynamically based on your eight core attributes.

• Strategic Turns: Manage your Action Points (AP) and Reaction Delays to outmaneuver the horrors lurking below.

Die, Rebirth, TranscendProgression is built around a deeply satisfying roguelite loop that rewards your persistence and tactical planning.

• Rebirth: When you fall, your dungeon progress is calculated into Rebirth EXP. This EXP determines the size of your Attribute Point pool. Spend these points to permanently boost your base stats: Strength, Agility, Intellect, Vitality, Perception, Perseverance, Willpower, and Spirituality.

• Optional Boss Portals: Every 10th floor harbors a portal leading to a formidable boss. Stepping through is entirely up to you, but if you choose to find and defeat these gatekeepers, you will unlock crucial new content, mechanics, and upgrades.

• Transcendence: Conquer the very first boss to unlock the Transcendence System. Choosing to Transcend requires a heavy sacrifice—resetting your attributes and dungeon progress completely —but rewards you with points to spend across eight distinct Transcendence Trees, one for each core attribute. Each tree offers unique, playstyle-defining bonuses: unlock exponential physical damage and permanent thorns in the Strength tree , manipulate Action Points and speed with Agility , or empower your monstrous allies through Spirituality.

Key Features:• Endless Descent: A procedurally scaling dungeon where the challenge—and the rewards—are infinite.

• Status Effect Mastery: Apply Magical DoTs like Burn, delay enemy turns with Shock, or drain their Action Points with Stun.

• High-Risk Fusion Damage: Unleash devastating Fusion attacks. Fusion scales incredibly hard if you invest heavily in both Strength and Intellect, but without proper investment, it will struggle to break through an enemy's combined Physical and Magical defenses.

• Summoner Builds: Invest in Spirituality to summon Giant Spiders and other allies whose stats scale directly alongside your own.
description_short: Descend into the abyss, navigate the dungeon, collect cards for your custom loadout, and fight monsters in turn-based combat. Death is only the beginning—use Rebirth to gain permanent attributes that scale everything you do, and dive back in to try again.
